vulnerability.reference: Reviewer overreliance on AI-generated patches without critical evaluation.
vulnerability.generated: Lack of mandatory security review for AI-generated patches leaves code review processes susceptible to accepting adversarially induced insecure code.

impact.reference: Vulnerability-inducing patches merged into critical software.
impact.generated: Insecure patches merged into codebases introduce exploitable vulnerabilities, compromising downstream software security and integrity.

dose_response.reference: Query-based attacks induce insecure code fixes, and reviewer overreliance leads to vulnerability-inducing patches merged into critical software.
dose_response.generated: Query-based adversarial prompts inducing insecure code, through trust in AI-generated patches, trigger the lack of mandatory security review, leading to merged insecure patches introducing exploitable vulnerabilities that compromise software integrity.
